data.body: Verified on current origin/main (1b77c6dad): make lint is GREEN (ruff check + format-check both pass). The immediate fix is present -- passes.py:96 carries '# noqa: F811 (name reused across scopes: kernel re-export vs this Field)'. AC1 (lint green on main) satisfied; AC2 root-cause (merge-skew, per-change-ref CI doesn't validate merged tree) is documented in the ticket body. AC3 (post-merge-CI guard) is a follow-up owned by epic 88ab. No code change needed in this checkout; proposing close as already-resolved.
